vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group

triage_decision.reason: The /etc/group directory has incorrect permissions that could allow unauthorized users to modify system files.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; misconfiguration; incorrect permissions; potential privilege escalation

llm_verdict.message:
<tool_call></tool_call> XML tags". So we need to wrap each function call in <function=...></function>. Probably we need to output something like:

```
<function=read_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/group
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
chmod 0644 /etc/group
</parameter>
</function>
```

But we need to nest them within <egypt> tags? Actually they said: "an inner <function=...></function> block must be nested within <tool_call></tool_call> XML tags". So we need to have an outer <egypt> tag? The top-level is <egypt>. Probably we output:

```
<egypt>
<function=read_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/group
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
chmod 0644 /etc/group
</parameter>
</function>
</egypt>
```

Make sure no extra spaces? We'll output exactly that.

Thus final answer.


<egypt>
<function=read_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/group
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
chmod 0644 /etc/group
</parameter>
</function>
</egypt>
